title: Data and supporting files for IPBES Spatial Planning and Connectivity Assessment data management report 2.3
author: Pashanejad, Ehsan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset supports IPBES SPC data management report 2.3. This dataset contains the following files: 
   ·            01_Workflow_Documents/ — methodology DOCX files (BISP_Extraction_Workflow_v2_Apr23_2026.docx is the canonical protocol), agentic system prompts, READMEs from each pipeline.  
   ·            02_Academic_Literature_Review/scripts/ — full Python toolchain (config_v3.py, part1…part7).  
   ·            02_Academic_Literature_Review/{outputs/summary_csvs, synthesis, taxonomy}/ — cleaned summary outputs.  
   ·            02_Academic_Literature_Review/outputs/evidence_extraction_pipeline/ — sub-pipeline that produced the curated method-family figures (e1–e4 + selected R scripts).  
   ·            03_National_Plans_Review/scripts/ — coordinator_v2.py, system1_gemini.py, system2_openrouter.py, manifest_reader.py, aggregate_corpus.py, retry_missing.py, r_corpus_figures.R.  
   ·            03_National_Plans_Review/inventories/ — manifest_analysis.json, pdf_inventory.csv, NDPs_SpatialPlans_ByCountry_Cleaned.xlsx, ndps_english.txt, spatial_plans_english.txt.  
   ·            03_National_Plans_Review/markdown_corpus/markdown_{ndp,spatial,marine}/ — System 1 outputs (.md and .meta.json) per doc-type.  
   ·            03_National_Plans_Review/json_extractions/system2_{ndp,spatial,marine}/ — System 2 BISP JSON records (production outputs).  
   ·            03_National_Plans_Review/corpus/ — corpus_matrix.csv, corpus_methods.csv, corpus_instruments.csv, corpus_summary.json, doc_id_map.json, figures/ (the two curated corpus figures).  
   ·            04_AI_Extraction_Prompts_and_Configs/ — bisp_prompts.py (canonical extraction prompt set), config.env.template, BISP_Agentic_System_Prompts.docx, SECURITY_NOTES.md, bisp_pipeline_v2_archive/ snapshot.  
   ·            06_Final_Outputs/academic_lit_figures/ — 9 curated academic-lit figures (PDF + PNG): fig_methods_raw_ranked_bar, figA_evidence_landscape, figB_ilk_compound, figB3_bubble_clean, figC_causal_chain_compound, figC5_bars_right_family_soft, figD_ilk_by_principle, figNPA_national_plans_heatmap, figNPB_literature_vs_plans_comparison.  
   ·            06_Final_Outputs/national_plans_corpus_figures/ — fig_corpus_depth_ladder, fig_corpus_heatmap (PDF + PNG).  
   ·            06_Final_Outputs/r_visualization_scripts/ — R scripts that produced each curated figure.  
   ·            06_Final_Outputs/key_csvs/ — evidence matrix, IPBES confidence table, BISP method guide, corpus summary, doc_id map.  
   ·            07_Metadata_and_README/ — submission_inventory.csv, MASTER_README.md.  
   
 This record is restricted, but viewing can be requested by registered reviewers of the IPBES SPC assessment. You must be logged in to request the dataset.
